input.headline: Abbott strikes $23bn deal for Cologuard cancer test maker Exact Sciences

raw.headline: Abbott strikes $23bn deal for Cologuard cancer test maker Exact Sciences

winner: A politician finally makes a big purchase... not of a yacht or a private jet, but of a company that sells toilet paper for colonoscopies instead! Abbott strikes $23bn deal for Exact Sciences' "Pre-Test Wipes" maker.

candidates.text: Why did Abbot find Exact Sciences a perfect match? Because they both know how to strike a deal when it comes to colon matters!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with wordplay on 'colon matters' and the context of the deal, but it's slightly forced and could be more specific to the companies involved."}

candidates.text: Why did Abbot break up with their last partner before Exact Sciences? Because they said "I can't afford you" and Abbott didn't want another colonoscopy!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'colonoscopy,' but it's a bit forced and relies on a weak connection between Abbott breaking up and the Cologuard test. It lacks specificity and could be more surprising."}

candidates.text: Why did the kangaroo sign a $23 billion contract with Abbott? Because he needed a company to help him "hop" over his "guard" of colon polyps!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the wordplay on 'hop' and 'guard,' but it's a bit forced and lacks clarity. The connection between the kangaroo and the cancer test is tenuous, reducing the surprise and specificity."}

candidates.text: A politician finally makes a big purchase... not of a yacht or a private jet, but of a company that sells toilet paper for colonoscopies instead! Abbott strikes $23bn deal for Exact Sciences' "Pre-Test Wipes" maker.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific, but the reference to 'Pre-Test Wipes' may be confusing or too niche for general humor impact."}

candidates.text: At this rate, soon we'll have a dollar bill worth a cancer test.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the play on money and cancer tests, but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity to the headline details."}
